top_signals.title: Trump says he doesn't want anything to do with Spain: 'Cut off all trade'
top_signals.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump slammed Spain for not contributing enough to NATO, as he attended the defense alliance summit in Turkey.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: FMC Decision Upheld That Detention Fees During Port Closure Are Unfair
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Court of Appeals for the D.C. Circuit recently issued a decision upholding the Federal Maritime Commission’s (FMC) determination that detention fees levied on a trucker by an ocean common carrier during a three-day port closure were unreasonable.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
